name: OS Login not enabled on VM instance
description: OS Login is not enabled on the VM instance. OS Login ties SSH access to Google accounts and enforces IAM-based authorization for SSH, removing the need to manage SSH keys manually. Without OS Login, SSH keys are managed per-instance via metadata, making it harder to revoke access promptly and audit who has shell access.
remediation: Enable OS Login at the project level (recommended) by setting the metadata key enable-oslogin=TRUE on the project: gcloud compute project-info add-metadata --metadata enable-oslogin=TRUE. Grant roles/compute.osLogin or roles/compute.osAdminLogin to users instead of managing SSH keys.
